top_signals.title: LG Electronics Shares Jump Over 300% in 2026 on Physical AI Push
top_signals.summary: LG Electronics Inc. shares have quadrupled this year as investors applaud the venerable Korean appliance maker’s shift into robotics.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
